message:
docs: update AGENTS.md, README, extension candidate pool, and beads state

- AGENTS.md: minor wording update
- README.md: update feature descriptions
- docs/extension-candidate-pool.json: refresh candidate pool with
  updated metadata for extension discovery and scoring
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync bead tracker with completed work from
  error taxonomy, CLI tests, extension popularity, agent tests,
  E2E suites, and conformance artifact additions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -189,7 +189,7 @@ CLI (clap) → Agent Loop → Provider (Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini) → Streaming R
 | `src/model.rs` | Message/content types |
 | `src/session.rs` | JSONL session persistence |
 | `src/sse.rs` | SSE parser for streaming |
-| `src/tui.rs` | Terminal UI (WIP) |
+| `src/tui.rs` | Terminal UI rendering helpers |
 | `src/config.rs` | Configuration loading |
 | `src/error.rs` | Error types |
